info.description: API server untuk mengelola WhatsApp messaging, status, dan webhook
info.title: WhatsApp API Server

get.description: Get list of chats with recent activity
Get list of all WhatsApp contacts
Get the QR code as PNG image for WhatsApp authentication (can be directly used in tags)
get.summary: Get WhatsApp QR code as PNG image

get.description: Get the current connection and login status of WhatsApp device
Get list of all connected WhatsApp devices
Get list of all joined WhatsApp groups

put.description: Update WhatsApp group name or description

post.description: Create a new WhatsApp group with specified participants
Join a WhatsApp group using an invite code/link
Add new participants to a WhatsApp group
Remove participants from a WhatsApp group

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific WhatsApp group
Get the QR code for WhatsApp authentication

post.description: Send text, image, document, or other media messages via WhatsApp

get.description: Retrieve sent status messages with pagination support

post.description: Send text, image, or video status message to WhatsApp

get.description: Download and proxy WhatsApp media files (images, videos, audio, documents) with Persistent Local Storage
Retrieve WhatsApp messages with filtering and pagination support

post.description: Send read receipts for specified messages

get.description: Get real-time message updates via SSE for a specific session

post.description: Send typing or stopped-typing indicator to a chat

get.description: Get all WhatsApp sessions for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new WhatsApp session for multi-device support

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific WhatsApp session

delete.description: Delete a WhatsApp session and cleanup resources

put.description: Enable/Disable AI auto reply and set custom prompt

get.description: Retrieve all chats for a specific WhatsApp session

post.description: Start WhatsApp connection process for a session (generates QR code)

get.description: Retrieve all contacts for a specific WhatsApp session

post.description: Send a WhatsApp message using a specific session

get.description: Retrieve QR code for WhatsApp session authentication

post.description: Configure webhook URL and retry settings for WhatsApp events
Retry all failed webhook deliveries from queue

get.description: Get current webhook configuration and status

post.description: Send a test webhook to verify configuration

dto.CreateGroupRequest.description: Request payload for creating a WhatsApp group

dto.MessageResponse.description: WhatsApp message details in API response

dto.SendMessageRequest.description: Request payload for sending WhatsApp messages

jid.description: Target chat JID (also accept "jid" from frontend)
